summary: A FOX 7 (Austin) local TV news package ('FOX 7' bug with clock/temp, 'THREE ARRESTED ACCUSED OF MILLIONS IN GIFT CARD FRAUD' chyron) showing suspect mugshots, gift-card aisle B-roll, a pile of seized cards, and a reporter explaining how three Latvian nationals allegedly cloned and resold gift cards in Texas. It is a recorded broadcast news segment, not an agency-produced music-driven video, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: THREE ARRESTED ACCUSED OF MILLIONS IN GIFT CARD FRAUD; FOX 7; Gift Cards
